# Dr. Tim — Functional Medicine & Metabolic Health

> Dr. Tim is a medical doctor (MD) specializing in Functional Medicine at Ultramed Clinic, Chonburi, Thailand. This site publishes Thai-language educational medical content about metabolic health, diabetes management, longevity, nutrition, lab interpretation, and root-cause health optimization.

Dr. Tim (หมอทิม) writes for a patient audience in Thai. Content is educational, evidence-informed, and should not replace individualized medical care. Key topics include Functional Medicine, insulin resistance, diabetes remission, CGM, nutrition, biomarkers, thyroid health, cardiovascular risk markers, and longevity science.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://drtim.co/): Featured and latest Thai-language medical articles from Dr. Tim.
- [Blog Index](https://drtim.co/blog): Full article archive.
- [CGM Program](https://drtim.co/cgm): Continuous glucose monitoring program for structured diabetes and metabolic health support.
- [VIP Coaching](https://drtim.co/vip-coaching): Premium 1:1 coaching program.
- [Diabetes Guide](https://drtim.co/diabetes-guide): Landing page for the lean diabetes / TOFI-focused diabetes guide.
- [Diabetes Guide Checkout](https://drtim.co/diabetes-guide/checkout): Checkout and payment instructions for the guide.
- [Privacy Policy](https://drtim.co/privacy-policy): Privacy and data policy.

## Content Areas

- [Diabetes Type 2](https://drtim.co/category/diabetes-type-2/): Articles about type 2 diabetes, insulin resistance, remission, and metabolic recovery.
- [Intermittent Fasting](https://drtim.co/category/intermittent-fasting/): Articles about fasting protocols and metabolic adaptation.
- [Cholesterol](https://drtim.co/category/cholesterol/): Articles about cholesterol, triglycerides, and cardiovascular markers.
- [Weight Control](https://drtim.co/category/weight-control/): Articles about body composition, appetite, and weight management.
- [Blood Profile](https://drtim.co/category/blood-profile/): Articles about lab markers and interpretation.
- [Fatty Liver](https://drtim.co/category/%e0%b9%84%e0%b8%82%e0%b8%a1%e0%b8%b1%e0%b8%99%e0%b8%9e%e0%b8%ad%e0%b8%81%e0%b8%95%e0%b8%b1%e0%b8%9a/): Thai articles about fatty liver and metabolic dysfunction.

## Featured Articles

- [What is CGM?](https://drtim.co/blog/what-is-cgm-continuous-glucose-monitor-functional-medicine/): Overview of continuous glucose monitoring in a Functional Medicine context.
- [Why Diabetics Should Use CGM](https://drtim.co/blog/why-diabetics-should-use-cgm/): Explains CGM benefits for people managing diabetes.
- [Fasting Insulin Test](https://drtim.co/blog/fasting-insulin-test/): Explains fasting insulin and metabolic risk interpretation.
- [Basic CGM Read](https://drtim.co/blog/basic-cgm-read/): Introductory guide to reading CGM data.
- [Diabetes Is Not a Disease, It Is Metabolic Crash](https://drtim.co/blog/diabetes-is-not-a-disease-it-is-metabolic-crash/): Metabolic framing of diabetes.
- [Diabetes Remission Consensus](https://drtim.co/blog/diabetes-remission-consensus/): Article about diabetes remission definitions and consensus.
